═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  INTELLIGENCE (INT) — Reference
  Formula: bonus = 1 + (INT ^ 0.8 × weight) / 600
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

INT has no augmentation multipliers and no BitNode multipliers.
calculateSkill(exp, mult=1) — mult is hardcoded to 1.
INT grows only through specific actions (see XP Sources below).

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  EFFECTS (weight × 1 unless noted)
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  HACKING
  ├── Hack success chance   weight=1   (calculateHackingChance)
  ├── Hack/grow/weaken time weight=1   (calculateHackingTime; grow/weaken
  │                                     are multiples of hack time)
  ├── Hack exp gain         NONE       (calculateHackingExpGain — no INT)
  └── Hack money %          NONE       (calculatePercentMoneyHacked — no INT)

  REPUTATION
  ├── Faction rep gain      weight=1   (all faction work types)
  └── Company rep gain      weight=1

  CRIME
  └── Crime success chance  weight=1   (successRate in Crime.ts)

  SHARE
  └── share() power output  weight=2   (Share.ts)

  PROGRAMS
  └── Create program speed  weight=3   (CreateProgramWork.ts — mult by
                                        hackLevel/reqLevel × intBonus)

  GRAFTING
  └── Grafting speed        weight=1   (GraftingHelpers.ts)

  BLADEBURNER
  └── Action competence     weight=0.75

  SLEEVES
  ├── Shock reduction       weight=0.75
  └── Sync gain             weight=0.5

  INFILTRATION
  └── Game timer bonus      weight=0.25 (reduces time for minigames)

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  SAMPLE VALUES
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  INT    weight=1    weight=2    weight=3
  ─────  ─────────  ─────────  ─────────
    50   ×1.0869    ×1.1738    ×1.2607
   100   ×1.1380    ×1.2761    ×1.4141
   150   ×1.1799    ×1.3598    ×1.5397
   200   ×1.2155    ×1.4310    ×1.6464
   253   ×1.1394*   ×1.2789*   ×1.4183*   ← current
   300   ×1.2738    ×1.5476    ×1.8213
   500   ×1.3532    ×1.7065    ×2.0597
  1000   ×1.4665    ×1.9330    ×2.3994

  * BN4 applies intelligenceOverride from bitNodeOptions — check
    ns.getBitNodeMultipliers() if values seem capped.

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  XP SOURCES (confirmed from source — scripts give ZERO INT exp)
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  Action                          INT exp gained
  ─────────────────────────────── ───────────────
  Install augmentation            15.0  (per aug)
  Soft reset                      15.0
  Travel to city (singularity)     3.0
  Backdoor server                  3.0  (terminal: 4 × log10(hackExpGained))
  Work for faction (setup call)    0.003
  Work for company (setup call)    0.0003
  Commit crime (setup call)        0.00003
  Homicide (on success)            6.5
  Extortion (on success)           3.25
  Mug (on success)                 3.0
  Drug trafficking (on success)    1.3
  Larceny (on success)             0.8
  Rob store (on success)           0.75
  Shoplift (on success)            0.375
  Create program (on complete)     hackLevel ÷ 10
  BN completion                  300.0
  Script hack() manual=true        0.005  (only manual invocation)

  NOTE: ns.hack(), ns.grow(), ns.weaken() give ZERO INT exp.
  Daemon's batch workers never set manual=true so earn nothing.
  The dominant passive source is crime (Homicide = 6.5/success).
  The dominant burst source is aug installs (15/aug × N augs).

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  GAINING INT EFFICIENTLY
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  1. Install augs every cycle — 15 exp per aug, compounds with aug count
  2. Homicide while doing crime (6.5/success, also builds karma/kills)
  3. Create programs — Formulas.exe at hack 1000 = 100 exp
  4. Don't skip coding contracts (daemon handles these automatically)
  5. Travel via singularity when needed (3 exp, minor but free)
  6. Backdoor all servers (3 exp each, one-time per reset)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
